name: Apple Oat Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix dry ingredients in a large bowl: bread flour, whole-wheat flour, nonfat dried milk, salt, oats, and yeast.
3. In another bowl, whisk together applesauce, concentrated apple juice, lemon juice, honey, yogurt, molasses, and canned or chopped apples until well combined.
4. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just mixed (do not overmix).
5. Grease a 9x5 inch loaf pan with butter or cooking spray.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
7. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Remove from oven and let cool in the pan for about 10 minutes before turning the bread out onto a wire rack to cool completely.
